title: senecio davilae
intro: Senecio davilae, also known as Resin Rose or Yellow Buttercup, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The herbal preparations of Senecio davilae often involve infusions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or added to topical creams and salves for local application.
